## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss transition plans for Marcel's departure and upcoming AI workshop logistics.](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel to maintain access to key systems through October; will be reviewed in November](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [AI workshop prep: intake form to be sent out, pre-build some apps, focus on small, achievable automations](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Post-workshop: use Asana board for tracking AI projects/requests, limit Slack engagement to specific channels](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Marcel drafting transition doc, will finalize Monday; plans to announce departure publicly in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### Transition Planning

  - [Marcel to keep access to Salesforce, HubSpot, Google suite through October](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Will remove access to HR systems (e.g. Bamboo) for hygiene reasons](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Marcel to compile list of systems where he's the owner, flag those needing ownership transfer](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Post-October: limit Slack engagement to specific channels, use Asana for project tracking](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Marcel drafting transition doc, to be completed Monday](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### AI Workshop Preparation

  - [Intake form created to gather attendee expectations and automation ideas](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [13+ confirmed attendees so far, more expected](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Marcel to pre-build some apps before workshop to streamline demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Focus on small, achievable automations to spark ideas and show potential](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Anoop to send out intake form today, amplify reminders next week](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Post-Workshop Strategy

  - [Use Asana board created by Dan for tracking AI project requests](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Marcel to assign himself to most impactful projects](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Plan to regroup early the week after workshop to determine office hours cadence](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Company Growth and Messaging

  - [DeepGram seeing rapid growth; messaging focuses on:](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
    1.  Increased productivity with flat headcount/marketing spend
    2.  Successful startup program (900% growth in PLG)
    3.  Notable customer examples (e.g., Prepared 911, potential Twilio case)
  - [Marcel to draft LinkedIn post about his departure, will send to Anoop for review](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Anoop to send out AI workshop intake form today](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Marcel to finalize transition document by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Marcel to compile list of systems needing ownership transfer](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Cancel next week's 1:1, focus on workshop prep](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Post-workshop: determine office hours cadence, support automation projects](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Marcel to draft LinkedIn departure post for Anoop's review (in \~2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/3oQCxeDPp_Ce1uGbmNVyd9nHMszihnrn?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
